description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude human figure, likely male, standing on a round, tiered pedestal. The figure is posed with both arms raised and slightly bent, as if reaching or gesturing upwards, and the head is tilted back, gazing in the same direction. The anatomical details are carefully rendered, with visible musculature and naturalistic body proportions. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, patinated bronze appearance, with greenish and brownish hues suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The base is solid and circular, providing stability and a classical presentation. The overall impression is one of expressive movement and upward aspiration.
description: A weathered bronze sculpture of a nude male figure standing on a round pedestal, arms raised and head tilted upward in a dynamic, expressive pose.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the back left, highlighting the curvature of the spine, the raised left arm, and the rounded base.
description_view_1: A direct rear view shows the back, both arms raised, and the full shape of the pedestal.
description_view_2: A front-left perspective reveals the facial features, chest, and the expressive upward gesture of both arms.
description_view_3: A frontal view emphasizes the face, chest, and the dynamic positioning of the arms, with the pedestal clearly visible below.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
